original_text: "Certifying agent" means an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations.
P: an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations
ig_script_full: E(certifying agent) F(means) P(an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations).

original_text: "Organic operation" means a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products.
P: a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products
ig_script_full: E(Organic operation) F(means) P(a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products).

original_text: "National Organic Standards Board" (NOSB) means the advisory board established to assist the Secretary.
P: the advisory board established to assist the Secretary
ig_script_full: E(National Organic Standards Board (NOSB)) F(means) P(the advisory board established to assist the Secretary).
notes: Definition of named entity. Named entity not decomposed per Named Entities Rule.

original_text: A producer of an organic operation must apply for certification with an accredited certifying agent annually.
Cex: with an accredited certifying agent | annually
ig_script_full: A,p(of an organic operation) A(producer) D(must) I(apply) Bdir(certification) Cex(with an accredited certifying agent) Cex(annually).
notes: Two execution constraints: manner (with an accredited certifying agent) and temporal (annually). No activation condition -- applies under all conditions.

original_text: Certified organic farmers must not apply synthetic chemicals to crops at any time once organic certification is conferred, or else the certifying agent will revoke certification from the farmer.
O: A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)
ig_script_full: A,p(Certified organic) A(farmers) D(must not) I(apply) Bdir(synthetic chemicals) Bind(crops) Cac(once organic certification is conferred) Cex(at any time), O{A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)}.
notes: Prohibition with vertically nested or-else sanction. 'once organic certification is conferred' is the activation condition. 'at any time' is a temporal execution constraint. Or-else clause encoded separately as S6.

original_text: [Or-else clause of S5 / rule 2.2]: the certifying agent will revoke certification from the farmer.
ig_script_full: A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer).
notes: Vertically nested consequential statement (Or else) of S5. Encoded separately for analytical tractability. 'will' treated as prescriptive deontic in enforcement context.

original_text: Upon receiving a certification application, the certifying agent must inspect the applicant's operation within 60 days.
ig_script_full: Cac(Upon receiving a certification application), A(certifying agent) D(must) I(inspect) Bdir(applicant's operation) Cex(within 60 days).
notes: Clear event-triggered activation condition. Execution constraint is temporal (within 60 days).

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed aim: sign]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(sign) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from compound aim 'sign and file' into S8 [AND] S9. 'following each site visit' is a temporal execution constraint.

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed aim: file]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(file) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from compound aim 'sign and file' into S8 [AND] S9. Combined statement: {S8 [AND] S9}.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed attribute: Certifiers]
ig_script_full: A(Certifiers) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from compound attribute 'Certifiers and Inspectors' into S10 [AND] S11. 'every three years' is a temporal execution constraint.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed attribute: Inspectors]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from compound attribute 'Certifiers and Inspectors' into S10 [AND] S11.

original_text: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act, a written notification of noncompliance shall be sent to the certifying agent.
Cac: when an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act
ig_script_full: Cac(when an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act), A([Program Manager]) D(shall) I(send) Bdir,p(written) Bdir(notification of noncompliance) Bind(certifying agent).
notes: Passive voice converted to active. Actor [Program Manager] inferred from 'inspection by the Program Manager'. Activation condition is an event (noncompliance revealed by inspection). Bdir,p encodes 'written' as property of direct object.

original_text: Any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic, except in accordance with the Act, shall be subject to a civil penalty.
Bind: any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic
Cac: when any operation knowingly sells or labels a product as organic except in accordance with the Act
ig_script_full: Cac(when any operation knowingly sells or labels a product as organic except in accordance with the Act), A([regulatory authority]) D(shall) I(impose) Bdir(civil penalty) Bind(any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic).
notes: Passive construction converted to active. Responsible actor [regulatory authority] inferred. 'except in accordance with the Act' scopes the activation condition. Compound action in Cac (sells [OR] labels) retained within condition clause at IG Core.

original_text: A certifying agent whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section may at any time submit a request for reinstatement of its accreditation.
A_prop: whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section
Bdir: request for reinstatement of its accreditation
ig_script_full: A,p(whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section) A(certifying agent) D(may) I(submit) Bdir(request for reinstatement of its accreditation) Cex(at any time).
notes: Permission statement. Attribute property encodes qualifying condition on the actor (suspended accreditation). 'at any time' is a temporal execution constraint signaling no restriction on timing of submission.
